changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Convert audit_log to TimescaleDB hypertable for time-series optimization.

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.sql: COMMENT ON TABLE audit_log IS 'TimescaleDB hypertable storing audit log entries. Chunks: 1 day. Compression: after 7 days. Retention: 90 days.';
